title: Design: Multiplexer-parameterized drain-with-worker skill + standalone tmux plugin
summary: Technical specification for implementing drain-with-worker skill with multiplexer abstraction, uv scripts, and standalone tmux plugin.
notes: Design bead fhsk-3qy, Status: Draft. Document specifies four artifacts (uv scripts, skill SKILL.md, tmux plugin, wiring/tests/docs). Contains concrete API contracts via Multiplexer abstraction table (spawn, send_text, send_enter, read_screen). Includes resolved design-review round 1 decisions and remaining risks. High confidence as SPEC: architecture definition + technical contracts, not a single decision (ADR) or user requirements (PRD).
